## Target Implementation

Example: Express, Node, Python, PHP, .NET, Java, Arduino, Node-RED, JS Client, or ecosystem-wide.

## Problem Statement

## Proposed Behavior

## Compatibility Impact

How would this affect existing JSON-RPC behavior, Safe Mode, introspection, schema metadata, or transports?

## Security / Introspection Impact

Does this expose new metadata, change authorization expectations, or affect production deployment guidance?

## Additional Context

Do not include secrets, tokens, passwords, private IPs, or private project/customer names.
